primary_artifact.description: Educational field guide to rave culture history, PLUR, RAVE Act policy context, harm reduction, and DJ basics.

what_happened.proof: User requested a fun full repo covering rave culture, RAVE Act, DJ terminology, and a story image.
GitHub repo management, image prompting, planning, verification workflows were used before build.
History and DJ terminology sources were gathered and summarized.
AI hero image created and committed at assets/images/rave-culture-timeline-hero.png in the field guide repo.
15 tracked files: README, docs, timeline JSON, image asset, verification script, license.
python3 scripts/verify.py returned VERIFY OK; markdown count 10; timeline events 13.

launch_lanes.action: Open the field guide repo and hero image; show docs/history and docs/dj.
Use this game-plan repo as the public-facing runbook of how the artifact was built.
Enable GitHub Pages or copy site/index.html into a Pages repo.
Add issues, contribution guide, city chapters, DJ practice examples.
No outreach/payment claims from this repo.
